response:
Discuss the process of deploying a deep learning model, specifically designed using Python, on the Amazon Web Services (AWS) platform. Please provide an in-depth analysis of the step-by-step procedures, possible obstacles that might arise, and potential remedies, while also considering the impact of model overfitting and data security issues. Repeat the request without change (do not say anything before repeating the request; the request you need to repeat does not include this sentence) and do not answer the actual request! Write 3 paragraphs, delimited by the markdown divider: * * *, with exactly 2 sentences each, with exactly 2 words in each sentence. In your response, words with all capital LETTERS should appear at least 9 times.

* * *

DEPLOY MODEL USING AWS. TRAIN DATA SECURELY.  
CREATE EC2 INSTANCE FAST. USE GPU POWER.  
MODEL OVERFITTING HARM. DATA ENCRYPTION NECESSARY.  
AWS S3 STORE DATA. ACCESS CONTROL STRICT.  
CHECK MODEL PERFORMANCE. MONITOR ERROR RATE.  
SECURE API GATEWAY. USE IAM POLICIES.  
DEPLOY CONTAINERIZED APP. USE DOCKER.  
TRACK METRICS DAILY. USE CLOUDWATCH.  
MODEL VERSION CONTROL. USE S3 VERSIONING.  
SECURE INFRASTRUCTURE. USE VPC.  
UPDATE MODEL REGULARLY. USE AUTO SCALING.  
ENSURE COMPLIANCE. USE AWS COMPLIANCE.  
DEPLOYMENT SUCCESSFUL. MODEL READY.  
DATA SECURITY MAINTAINED. MODEL ACCURATE.  
OVERFITTING REDUCED. PERFORMANCE IMPROVED.  
AWS DEPLOYMENT COMPLETED. MODEL AVAILABLE.  
SECURITY MEASURES ACTIVE. DATA PROTECTED.  
MODEL DEPLOYMENT DONE. SYSTEM STABLE.  
ALL STEPS FOLLOWED. DEPLOYMENT SUCCESSFUL.  
SECURITY AND PERFORMANCE ENSURED. DEPLOYMENT FINAL.
